name: Memory Management (Pagefile & Prefetch Config)
categoryDescription: Core system configuration — environment variables, power settings, locale, and boot configuration.
description: Pagefile configuration and Prefetch service settings.
forensic_value: EnablePrefetcher=0 means no Prefetch artifacts. ClearPageFileAtShutdown=1 destroys in-memory evidence. Anti-forensic settings in unmanaged environment are suspicious.
